typography.description: Premium, highly legible geometric sans pairing mimicking Linear/Superhuman. Avoid Inter. Outfit for headings gives character, Manrope for body ensures flawless legibility at small UI scales. Restricted to Regular (400) and Medium (500) to force a flat, refined hierarchy without relying on heavy weights.

topbar.content: Platform switcher tabs (Instagram pink dot, LinkedIn blue dot), date range selector, live sync indicator, notification bell

stats_cards.recipe: Card component (bg-secondary, 12px rounded). Top: subtle text-secondary label (text-sm font-400). Middle: large metric text-primary (text-3xl font-500). Bottom: Recharts TinyLineChart sparkline using primary purple or success green.

weekly_views_chart.recipe: Recharts BarChart inside Card. X-axis (days), Y-axis hidden. Bars: primary #7c3aed, radius [4, 4, 0, 0]. Tooltip: #1a1a1a bg, 0.5px border, white text.

audience_donut.recipe: Recharts PieChart (donut style). Inner radius 60%, outer radius 80%. Colors: Instagram #C13584, LinkedIn #0A66C2. Custom active shape on hover.

task_widget.recipe: Card container. Header with 'Tasks' and add modal trigger. List items grouped. Each item: priority dot (red/yellow/gray), task name (text-sm white), assignee avatar. Hover row: bg-tertiary.

ai_insight_card.recipe: Card container with subtle gradient border (using primary #7c3aed at 20% opacity). Sparkles icon. Text: actionable insights based on audience donut data.

post_detail_drawer.pattern: Right-side slide-out drawer. Width: 400px. Overlay: bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm. 0.5px left border.

add_member_wizard.pattern: Centered modal, max-w-lg. 4-step progress bar (height 2px, primary color). Step 1: Email, Step 2: Role select, Step 3: Permission toggles (switch components), Step 4: Review.

platform_switcher.recipe: Tabs component in Topbar. Clean text tabs with a 6px dot indicator next to label (Instagram #C13584 / LinkedIn #0A66C2). Active tab gets bottom border or white text.

micro_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links transition background/border in 150ms ease. No scaling/bouncing (professional feel).
micro_interactions.active_states: Slight background darkening or border opacity increase (hover rgba(255,255,255,0.15)).
micro_interactions.focus_states: 2px solid #7c3aed outline, offset by 2px with #0f0f0f background.
micro_interactions.empty_states: Minimalist layout, using empty_state_graphic image (max-w-[200px]), text-secondary instructions, and a subtle primary outline CTA button.

auth_background.description: Abstract 3D dark glassmorphism scene for login/signup wizard split-screen.

empty_state_graphic.description: Minimalist wireframe folder icon for Media Vault or empty table states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use lucide-react for all standard icons.
Do not use generic font Inter. Ensure Outfit and Manrope are loaded.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='login-submit-button').
Implement 0.5px borders exactly. If CSS 0.5px fails in certain browsers, use a 1px border with the provided 0.08 alpha color.
Ensure the application strictly handles light/dark mode via the provided color scales. The requested design targets dark mode primarily.
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for complex layout patterns; use customized Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, selects, modals, and tables.
Follow the 150ms ease rule strictly for all hover and active states.
